timeline.lyric: When I pressed play on the time machine (which was actually a British phone booth painted green, don't ask), my only intention was to grab some cool rocks and see a dinosaur before dinner.

I landed in a valley of moss and smoke. Smell of rain, fire in the air. And there he was: the first human I'd ever seen. Crouched by a pile of stones, blowing on a twig like his life depended on it. And it did.
